commands.review_summary:
The PR changes SDK list helpers to send `{}` when no params are passed, preserves explicit malformed values such as `null`, and adds focused unit/e2e assertions for the list-helper request params.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +71. Total +71 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: unclear. for a live Gateway rejection because current Gateway dispatch coalesces missing `req.params` to `{}` before handlers validate. The SDK wire-shape issue is source-reproducible: current main passes `undefined` from no-arg list helpers and `GatewayClient` omits that field when stringifying the request frame.

target.title: fix(sdk): list helpers work without filters
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where SDK users calling list helpers without filters could send Gateway requests with omitted `params`, causing strict Gateway list validators to reject otherwise valid no-filter calls.

## Why This Change Was Made

SDK list helpers now send `{}` only when params are omitted, matching the Gateway object-param contract without masking explicit malformed values such as `null`. The focused tests cover no-arg helper calls and preserve explicit `null` so Gateway validation still owns invalid input.

## User Impact

Developers can call `oc.agents.list()`, `oc.sessions.list()`, `oc.tasks.list()`, `oc.models.list()`, `oc.tools.list()`, `oc.approvals.list()`, and `oc.environments.list()` without passing empty filter objects manually.

## Evidence

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node --check packages/sdk/src/client.ts`
- `codex review --base origin/main` accepted one finding about explicit `null` coercion; fixed and reran clean with no introduced correctness issues.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/sdk/src/index.test.ts packages/sdk/src/index.e2e.test.ts` blocked locally because this sparse worktree has no `node_modules` (`OPENCLAW_MISSING_VITEST`).
- Remote proof attempted before PR: Crabbox coordinator returned 401, and a fresh Blacksmith Testbox stayed queued and was stopped. Exact-head GitHub CI will be run on this PR.
target.author: vincentkoc
